cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out if Jerry tells the truth. The problem gives me statements from several people: Sherrie, Ryan, Bernita, Tamika, and Jerry. Let me list out what each person says again to make sure I have it right. Sherrie tells the truth. So, Sherrie is a truth-teller. Ryan says Sherrie lies. Wait, but Sherrie tells the truth according to the problem statement. So Ryan is saying that Sherrie lies, but since Sherrie actually tells the truth, Ryan must be lying. So Ryan is a liar. Then Bernita says Ryan tells the truth. But we just established that Ryan is lying, so Bernita is saying something false. Therefore, Bernita is also lying. Next, Tamika says Bernita lies.
